name: Weixin (WeChat Public Account)
description: WeChat 公众号 / Service Account integration. Outbound via Customer Service Message API (api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send) with auto-rotated access_token (2-hour TTL, 60s skew). Inbound via Server Configuration callback URL with SHA1 signature verification + XML payload parsing. Set WEIXIN_APPID + WEIXIN_SECRET (Service Account credentials) and WEIXIN_TOKEN (callback verification token, optional for outbound-only).
